zh.Herdmanston, East Lothian, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安
zh.Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland: 蘇格蘭米德洛迪安洛斯林
zh.Rosslyn, Midlothian, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安洛斯林
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslyn於1110年出生在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安洛斯林時，他的父親Henry Sinclair36歲，母親Rosabel Strathearn20歲。他於1134年之前與Margaret Grathney在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安洛斯林結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1180年在他的家鄉享年70歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安洛斯林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslyn于1110年出生在英国苏格兰米德洛迪安洛斯林时，他的父亲Henry Sinclair36岁，母亲Rosabel Strathearn20岁。他于1134年之前与Margaret Grathney在苏格兰米德洛迪安洛斯林结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1180年在他的家乡享年70岁，埋葬在苏格兰米德洛迪安洛斯林。

nameMeanings.name: Sinclair
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Saint-Clair-sur-Elle (Manche), so called from the dedication of its church to Saint Clarus (see   Clare   3).
Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish surname.

History: The Scottish family Sinclair (see 1 above) came to southern Scotland in the twelfth century from Huntingdonshire with the de Morvilles. Descendants of these Sinclairs became earls of Caithness in the 15th century. The frequency of the surname in Caithness and Orkney is largely due to the adoption by tenants of the name of their overlord.

variants.name: Clare
meanings: Irish (Clare, Wicklow, and Wexford): habitational name from Clare in Suffolk (an eastern county of England), the center of a major Norman baronial estate since the Norman Conquest. The English placename probably originated as a Celtic river name meaning ‘bright, gentle, or warm’. The surname is not from the Irish county name Clare, which is either from the surname or from a place called with Gaelic clár ‘plank bridge’. Another Norman surname in the southeast of Ireland was de Clere, from Clères in Seine-Maritime (France), named from the local river.

English and French: from the Middle English, Old French female personal name Cla(i)re (from Latin Clara, from clarus ‘clear, bright, famous’) which achieved some popularity, greater elsewhere in Europe than in England, through the fame of Saint Clare of Assisi (see Chiara ). The English surname seems to have been interchangeable with Clear 1.

English: occupational name from an agent derivative of Middle English cley ‘clay’. The work of medieval clayers involved plastering a framework of interwoven twigs with mud to produce wattle-and-daub work.

variants.name: St. Clair
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Sinclair  . This is also a French Canadian and American French altered form of the same surname.
French (Saint-Clair): habitational name from any of several places, e.g. in Normandy, named Saint-Clair (from the dedication of their churches to Saint Clarus). Compare Saintclair .

Haitian (also Saint-Clair): ornamental name or nickname, perhaps ironic, composed of French saint ‘saint’ or ‘holy’ and clair ‘clear’ or ‘lightness’. Alternatively, perhaps of the same French origin as 2 above. Compare Saintclair .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslyn was born in 1110, in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Henry Sinclair, was 36 and his mother, Rosabel Strathearn, was 20. He married Margaret Grathney before 1134, in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 6 daughters. He died in 1180, in his hometown, at the age of 70, and was buried in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslyn est né en 1110, à Roslin, Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry Sinclair, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Rosabel Strathearn, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Grathney avant 1134, à Roslin, Midlothian, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé en 1180, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Roslin, Midlothian, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslyn 1110 in Roslin, Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Sinclair 36 und seine Mutter Rosabel Strathearn 20. Er hat vor 1134 in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland Margaret Grathney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb 1180 im Alter von 70 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslyn è nato il nel 1110 nel Roslin, Midlothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Henry Sinclair, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Rosabel Strathearn, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Grathney prima del 1134, nel Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1180, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslynが1110年にイギリススコットランドミドロスアンロスリンで生まれた時，父Henry Sinclairは36歳，母Rosabel Strathearnは20歳であった。1134年以前にスコットランドミドロスアンロスリンでMargaret Grathneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1180年に故郷で70歳で死去し，スコットランドミドロスアンロスリンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslyn(이)가 1110년 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언 로슬린에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Sinclair(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Rosabel Strathearn(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1134년 이전 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 로슬린에서 Margaret Grathney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1180년 그의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 로슬린에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslyn nasceu em 1110, em Roslin, Midlothian, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry Sinclair, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Rosabel Strathearn, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Grathney antes 1134, em Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1180, em sua cidade natal, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslyn родился в 1110 г. в местности рослинь, мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Henry Sinclair было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Rosabel Strathearn, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Grathney перед 1134 г. в местности рослинь, мидлотян, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер в 1180 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности рослинь, мидлотян, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslyn nació en 1110, en Roslin, Midlothian, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Henry Sinclair, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Rosabel Strathearn, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Margaret Grathney antes de 1134, en Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1180, en su pueblo, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland.
